mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_loan ( member_id, item_no, loan_status, loan_date, return_due_date ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{itemNo}, 'LOAN', NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_loan SET loan_status = 'RETURNED', return_date = NOW() WHERE loan_no = #{loanNo}
mapper.select: SELECT item_no FROM tb_book_item WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} AND item_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND delete_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT l.loan_no, l.member_id, l.item_no, l.loan_status, l.loan_date, l.return_due_date, l.return_date, b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher FROM tb_loan l JOIN tb_book_item i ON l.item_no = i.item_no JOIN tb_book b ON i.book_no = b.book_no WHERE l.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY l.loan_date DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{pageUnit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_loan WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND loan_status = 'LOAN'

SELECT l.loan_no, l.member_id, l.item_no, l.loan_status, l.loan_date, l.return_due_date, l.return_date, b.book_no, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_publisher, m.member_name FROM tb_loan l JOIN tb_book_item i ON l.item_no = i.item_no JOIN tb_book b ON i.book_no = b.book_no JOIN tb_member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id WHERE 1=1
AND l.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY l.loan_date DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{pageUnit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_loan l JOIN tb_book_item i ON l.item_no = i.item_no JOIN tb_book b ON i.book_no = b.book_no WHERE 1=1
AND l.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
